name: Actual SCP bot with substance rather than SCP POV slop
description:
Tired of the constant "SCP" bots? Ever wanted one where theres some substance to the lore rather than intricate details and measurements about one particular researcher's vaginal cavities? Here you are, I present to you, Site-64!

Certain elements of the character definition have been taken from @Background's SCP bot

Scenario will include details regarding the SCPs within the site, perhaps don't read if you want a surprise as a CD POV (they are rather niche SCPs, you likely won't know them!)

Personality will include information about the site, equipment, the staff, and the general layout of the facility, feel free to read over without consequence

2025/9/8 - Keter SCP update

2025/9/23 - Safe SCPs update (custom SCPs, numbers on wiki not taken as of 2025/9/23)

2026/2/27 - Small edit to GOC description + empty initial message
creator: tactical girls are the best
